name: Thundagun
description: A lightning fast performance mod for Resonite. It improves performance by decoupling the FrooxEngine and Unity loops by running FrooxEngine and Unity on separate threads.
author: Frozenreflex

releases.changelog:
IMPORTANT: PhotonDust Particles and World Ambient Lighting are NOT WORKING in this version

## What's Changed
* Fix crashing, yeet legacy particles, update skybox connector by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/96


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2-beta

New patch version. Fixed post processing crashes and other issues. Made UIX less prone to breaking. Fixed particle system crash.

**Warning: This mod is experimental. It may contain bugs and other issues. Crashes and missing/buggy/jittery visuals are possible but are generally uncommon. Use at your own risk.**

## What's Changed
* Patch out original post processing update by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/89
* Use Thread.Sleep instead of SpinWait by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/87
* Delay UIX updates until the next FrooxEngine update to probably fix UIX breaking in the dash by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/90
* Fix potential memory leak by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/91
* Fixed Startup Crash due to Resonite's ParticleSystem refactor. Hotfixed by … by @BlueberryWolf in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/94

## New Contributors
* @BlueberryWolf made their first contribution in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/94

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

New minor version. Fixed settings initialization by removing CameraPostProcessingManager reference and added an "EmulateVanilla" option to improve desktop mode performance. Other improvements include batching completed updates from FrooxEngine, switching to spinwait for lower latency, fixing Linux crashes under Proton, ensuring deterministic builds, and enhancing code readability with formatting.

**Warning: This mod is experimental. It may contain bugs and other issues. Crashes and missing/buggy/jittery visuals are possible but are generally uncommon. Use at your own risk.**

## What's Changed
* Missing Link Override by @SectOLT in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/76
* Fix various settings not initializing by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/81
* Proton crash fix by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/83
* Fix crash when desktop viewer is disabled by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/84
* Skip desktop viewer patch on linux native by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/85
* Update packet batching, UIX patch, EmulateVanilla mode by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/78
* Switched to spinwait instead of thread.sleep for less latency by @DoubleStyx 

## New Contributors
* @SectOLT made their first contribution in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/76

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

New patch version. Adds some new connectors and fixes some existing ones.

**Warning: This mod is a prerelease. It may contain bugs and other issues. Crashes and missing/buggy/jittery visuals are possible but are generally uncommon. Use at your own risk.**

## What's Changed
* Patch DuplicableDisplay.Update to run on the Unity thread, fixes desktop viewer crash. Add publicizer package to make accessing private fields easy by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/57
* Fix particles to have the right materials, fix DestroyUnityComponentConnector to call base.Update() first by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/60
* Fix material property blocks, add note that RenderIncompleteUpdates can be glitchy by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/59
* Render queue processor update by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/62
* Update readme links by @Merith-TK in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/63

## New Contributors
* @Merith-TK made their first contribution in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/63

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/compare/1.1.0-beta...1.1.1

New minor version.

**Warning: This mod is a prerelease. It may contain bugs and other issues. Crashes and missing/buggy/jittery visuals are possible but are generally uncommon. Use at your own risk.**

## What's Changed
* Implement VideoTextureConnector by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/49
* add option to render incomplete frames by @DoubleStyx in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/51
* Use custom RenderSettings without Slot refs by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/50


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/compare/1.0.1-beta...1.1.0-beta

Fixes changes to the MeshRenderer and SkinnedMeshRenderer connectors that introduced flickering.
Cleans up some RenderMaterialOverride code and other code.
Fixes #8. 

**Warning: This mod is a prerelease. It may contain bugs and other issues. Crashes and missing/buggy/jittery visuals are possible but are generally uncommon. Use at your own risk.**

## What's Changed
* Add RenderContextOverride<T> and RenderMaterialOverride connector, update some other connectors by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/45
* Fix skinned mesh renderer dynamic bones flickering bug, fix pink material bug, add LODGroup connector, fix render material override, and some cleanup by @Nytra in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/48


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/compare/1.0.0-beta...1.0.1-beta

Initial beta release. Should be stable enough now for most use cases. UI should hopefully not break anymore, as FrooxEngine will never run before Unity has finished processing changes, and Unity will never process changes until FrooxEngine is done. The main goal at this point is to allow Unity to keep rendering if FrooxEngine doesn't have anything to present, which should boost framerate and protect against hitching in VR.

**Warning: This mod is a prerelease. It may contain bugs and other issues. Crashes and missing/buggy/jittery visuals are possible but are generally uncommon. Use at your own risk.**

## What's Changed
* Buffering by @DoubleStyx in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/44

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/compare/1.1.0-alpha...1.0.0-beta

New minor version. Fixes issues related to UI for the most part. Simplifies/unifies the config usage, exposing settings for min/max engine/Unity tick rates. Should generally be more stable and performant than the previous version.

**Warning: This mod is a prerelease. It may contain bugs and other issues. Crashes and missing/buggy/jittery visuals are possible but are generally uncommon. Use at your own risk.**

* Prerelease prep by @DoubleStyx in https://github.com/Frozenreflex/Thundagun/pull/31

name: IDontNeedHelp
description: Removes the 'Help' Tab on the Dashboard
author: nalathethird

releases.changelog:
Made a mod to patch out the Help Section, it got in my way, maybe it got in yours too. 
(This mod is for "experienced" Resonite uses that don't really need the help section, as its meant to educate new users)
### Due to how the patch is made, If you change the config value, you NEED to restart your entire game in order for the UI to refresh properly. Please keep that in mind if you want to see the help menu again (Or just, ya know, delete/rename/move the mod from 'rml_mods' folder)

## Installation
1. Install [ResoniteModLoader](https://github.com/resonite-modding-group/ResoniteModLoader).
2. Place [IDontNeedHelp.dll](https://github.com/nalathethird/Fck-HelpSection/releases/latest/download/IDontNeedHelp.dll) into your `rml_mods` folder. This folder should be at `C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Resonite\rml_mods` for a default install. You can create it if it's missing, or if you launch the game once with ResoniteModLoader installed it will create this folder for you.
3. Start the game. If you want to verify that the mod is working you can check your Resonite logs.

name: SessionCaptureBlocker
description: Prevents session thumbnail generation and upload in sessions with selected AccessLevels
author: nalathethird

releases.changelog:
This release changes a few things about the mod:

Firstly, we update for .NET10
Second, we actually added 2 new Harmony patches for Session Captures, in which both of them ACTUALLY stop session capture from generating on your PC ENTIRELY (Patch 1.0.3 did not fix this, Im sorry for holding up to that low of a standard)

And lastly, I moved CaptureInLAN config value up in the chain, to properly reflect Session Level Hierarchy.
(it shouldent mess with config values, but it might, so just be careful!)

Stay safe Resonite!
-Nala

PS: Unless this bug STILL is not fully patched, I will do my best to keep this mod updated. If anything unexpected happens, please create an [Issue](https://github.com/nalathethird/SessionCaptureBlocker/issues/new/choose)

# 1.0.3 - Compile for Pull Request (https://github.com/nalathethird/Fck-SessionCapture/pull/1)
Fixes some oversights I had on this mod, and has @Raidriar796 's first commit - Thanks!

Hopefully in time, my mod will become obsolete in fixing my security request, but this version fixes some issues I have overlooked in the first few iterations of it.
Again, feel free to contribute if anyone sees issues!

## Fixes: 
- Logging is reduced: Only to show that the mod is patching and working and logs only for an unusual situation or error in the method.
- Session Capture is no longer captured and stored in the data folder: it used to be captured and written to the assets folder the user allocates; it no longer does this with a config option. Additionally, "There is also a new config option to always capture thumbnails anyway even when they're never uploaded or shared, in-case a user wants to still see their thumbnails locally." - Raidriar's PR.
Recomplie of mod for .NET9, nothing changed in the code from this release, prior to last patch.

# FckSessionCapture v1.0.1 (Hotfix)

- Checks if the world is focused and then run the blocker.
- Now respects the config for each world type.
- Added config toggles for ContactsPlus and RegisteredUsers.

Not much else this hotfix, let me know if theres issues, or feel free to commit it yourself if you find anything broken.

# FckSessionCapture v1.0.0

- Initial release.
- Block session capture uploads in Private, Contacts-Only, LAN, and Public sessions.
- Optionally block local session capture generation for maximum privacy.
- Extensive logging for debugging and transparency.

Not much else here, and I'm not entirely sure if there will be a new patch or not. I considered adding OBS/Live Stream Support for Streamers, but let me know in a Issues if you want to see that, or feel free to commit it yourself!

## Changes

+ **Submenu history is now properly cleared** when opening submenus from an outside source (e.g. a TouchButton in the world) (#8)
- **Removed Debug Logging option**. Debug logs will instead be shown based on the logging level you have set in your mod loader (#7)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/noblereign/ResoniteContextMenuBackOption/compare/v2.3.0...v2.3.1

## Changes

+ **The existing button check is now much more robust!** This should greatly increase compatibility with all kinds of submenu setups. If you find an object that has a back button the mod can't detect, please [make an issue!](https://github.com/noblereign/ResoniteContextMenuBackOption/issues/new)
+ Added "Debug Logging" option which defaults to off. This disables most of the logs the mod makes, cleaning up a lot of space in the logfile. ^^
+ Fixed the logic for remembering previous pages. Now it should be consistent, and not jump between pages.
+ Fixed the math behind the "hiding" animation for the fancy button, it now works properly with custom sizes.
+ Mod now targets .NET 10.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/noblereign/ResoniteContextMenuBackOption/compare/v2.2.0...v2.3.0

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/noblereign/ResoniteContextMenuBackOption/compare/v2.0.2...v2.1.0

## Changes
**New option:** "Override Description for Existing Buttons" replaces the text on existing back buttons to match the mod. (Does nothing if used with Alternate Design)

releases.changelog:
This releases fixes an edge case on .NET 4.7.2 where the mod won't load the patches.

- Fixed edge case on Windows .NET 4.7.2 where the Outflow patches won't load due to their classes never being constructed.


Enjoy!

It's here, fellas! I've been waiting to do a full release until I've verified that A) Our networking libraries *are* infact thread-safe, and B) That the mod itself doesn't cause any subtle corruptions in the networking. This is functionally identical to 0.0.1.0 (aside from conditionally-compiled debug prints that don't exist in the release build)

As always, be sure to keep an eye out for issues but I'm quite certain this build should be safe to use on your client/headless equally. Keep in mind that only the host of the session requires the mod for everyone to benefit. This is **not** required by other clients, won't do anything in sessions you don't own.

Also we're going back to 3-place version numbers since 4 isn't compatible with the mod manifest - you'll find it on there soon™™

Anyways,

Enjoy!

This release fixes some issues with packet ordering by completely re-doing the methodology behind how the mod works to be far more pragmatic.

- Completely re-work to only process streams on a separate thread while leaving the normal packet queue alone
    - This should fix issues with the packet order that arose from the previous method (invasive full function replacement)
    - This ensures streams keep flowing while the normal packet queue remains untouched, should increase stability significantly
- Added new graphs to and description to README

As always, keep an eye out for issues! This should hopefully be the last pre-release before slapping the big green sticker on it.

Enjoy!

This release fixes compatibility with .NET 8 (Supported by Resonite Headless servers via [Cumulo Patcher](https://github.com/RileyGuy/Cumulo)) by using the correct compatible harmony version.

- Fix .NET 8 compatibility
- Use non-monomod methods to ensure full compatibility with regular Harmony

Enjoy!

This is an initial pre-release of Outflow! Please report any issues you have with this as I haven't tested this in a very large, populated sessions.

This very much shouldn't corrupt the state of the world, but do be aware that it's a distinct possibility! You have been warned!

Regardless,

Enjoy!

releases.changelog:
This release addresses the performance degradation caused by SessionTweaks itself. Thank you for fixing it.
※This version is built on a Linux machine. While there should be no issues according to Resonite's specifications, please create an Issue if you encounter any problems.

---

## What's Changed
* Re-re branding, set version 5.0.0 by @kazu0617 in https://github.com/kazu0617/SessionTweaks/pull/11
* Fix #12 + a couple other changes by @noblereign in https://github.com/kazu0617/SessionTweaks/pull/13

## New Contributors
* @kazu0617 made their first contribution in https://github.com/kazu0617/SessionTweaks/pull/11

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kazu0617/SessionTweaks/compare/4.0.0...5.1.0

dotnet 9 support 🎉It also fix some miror miss, bugs.

releases.changelog:
## Contribution by [ModernBalloonie](https://github.com/ModernBalloonie)
- Fix lowering eyebrows
- Target .net 10.0

- Fix https://github.com/Zeitheron/VDFaceTracking/issues/5 (Thread.Abort -> Thread.Interrupt)
- Handle Windows memory-mapped file requirement gracefully

# Fix crash with latest Resonite!
And some more parameters are now passed through.
Will need help with testing out and/or patching any face shapes if any issues would arise.
Add [tongue](https://github.com/guygodin/VirtualDesktop.VRCFaceTracking/commit/237fd9a34cc2e057549d3dd281df9dfaa54a54e5) tracking for VD v1.30 or later.

# Fix AssemblyVersion for mod manifest

There was an extra .0 which shouldn't be there.
Also update year to 2024.

# Fixed eye openness not going all the way.
This happens when closing just one eye. VD had a [solution](https://github.com/guygodin/VirtualDesktop.VRCFaceTracking/blob/fc1dfb60277cb98f2d81eb2dc8d5987d8755880c/TrackingModule.cs#L168) that works, copied that over 🙂

## On a smaller note, the version number of the DLL is correct.

# Initial release for Virtual Desktop Face Tracking for Resonite!
## Huge thanks to dfgHiatus for QuestPro4Neos mod which was basically used as a baseline for doing this mod.

releases.changelog: Updated the VarjoLib.dll location to fit into rml_libs.  Not a big change!  This change was done for Resolute compatibility.

I have worked with a fork of dfgHiatus' Neos Varjo Eye Tracking with Native support, and updated it to work with Resonite.  the history is a little skewed but I did the best I could to make it work!

No longer does the Varjo Eye Tracking require the companion interface!  This does however add one more folder to your rml_mods folder called TrackingLibs.  Inside of that is the latest VarjoLib.dll to work with the latest Varjo Base.

There are still issues with this build, such as blink detection not being great.  I am still new to this whole coding business, but this should work for all who have a Varjo Aero!

This build is for the splittening version of Resonite!

To install: Download the .zip, and place the contents into your rml_mods folder

UPDATED VERSIONING TO SEMANTIC FOR RESOLUTE!
